tools.name: polybridge_search
tools.description: Search public prediction markets for markets relevant to a natural-language topic or question. Use when you need candidate markets, market URLs, outcomes, statuses, and relevance scores. Do not use for a final probability forecast, market-history lookup, trading, or private/internal data. tools.name: polybridge_forecast
tools.description: Generate a read-only probability forecast for a clearly stated future event by searching relevant prediction markets and synthesizing evidence.
